name: Welcome — Friendly
content: Hi {{name}} 👋 Welcome to {{company_name}}! We’re excited to have you. Reply HELLO for help or visit {{link}}

name: Welcome — Formal
content: Hello {{name}}, welcome to {{company_name}}. If you need assistance, reply here or visit {{link}}

name: New Offer — Promo
content: Hi {{name}}, enjoy {{discount}}% off {{product}} today. Use code {{discount_code}} at checkout — valid until {{expiry_date}}. Shop: {{link}}

name: Seasonal Promo
content: Hey {{name}}! Summer sale — save {{discount}}% across all {{category}}. Use {{discount_code}}. Grab it now: {{link}}

name: Abandoned Cart — Friendly
content: Hi {{name}}, you left {{product}} in your cart. Complete your order now and get {{discount}}% off with code {{discount_code}}: {{link}}

name: Abandoned Cart — Formal
content: Hello {{name}}, your cart still contains {{product}}. Finish checkout here: {{link}}. Use {{discount_code}} for a discount.

name: Order Confirmation
content: Thanks {{name}}! Order {{order_id}} is confirmed. Items: {{item_list}}. Total: {{price}}. Track: {{tracking_link}}

name: Shipping Update
content: Good news {{name}}, order {{order_id}} has shipped. Track here: {{tracking_link}}. ETA: {{delivery_date}}

name: Delivery Confirmation
content: Hi {{name}}, your order {{order_id}} was delivered on {{delivery_date}}. Need support? Reply or contact {{agent_name}}.

name: Appointment Reminder
content: Reminder: Your appointment with {{company_name}} is on {{date_time}}. Reply YES to confirm or call {{phone}} to reschedule.

name: Event Invite
content: You’re invited to {{event_name}} on {{date_time}} at {{location}}. RSVP: {{rsvp_link}} — seats limited.

name: Re-engagement — Win-back
content: Hi {{name}}, we miss you — here’s {{discount}}% off to come back. Use {{discount_code}} before {{expiry_date}}: {{link}}

name: Flash Sale — Urgency
content: FLASH SALE — {{discount}}% off for the next {{hours}} hours only. Use {{discount_code}}: {{link}} — don’t miss out!

name: Cross-sell Recommendation
content: Hi {{name}}, customers who bought {{product}} also loved {{recommended_product}}. Save {{discount}}%: {{link}}

name: Subscription Renewal
content: Hi {{name}}, your {{service}} subscription renews on {{renewal_date}}. Update payment or cancel: {{billing_link}}

name: Payment Failed
content: We couldn't process payment for order {{order_id}}. Please update payment: {{payment_link}} or reply for help.

name: Feedback — Review Request
content: Hi {{name}}, thanks for buying {{product}}. Please rate your experience (1-5) or leave a review: {{review_link}}

name: Referral Program
content: Refer a friend and you both get {{reward}}. Share your link: {{ref_link}}

name: Quick Survey (NPS)
content: Quick question {{name}}: On a scale 0-10, how likely are you to recommend {{company_name}}? Reply with a number.
